creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update net/pavuk port.


diff -Nru pavuk/Makefile pavuk-0.9.15/Makefile
--- pavuk/Makefile	Thu May 20 02:38:49 1999
+++ pavuk-0.9.15/Makefile	Fri Jun 25 09:41:58 1999
@@ -1,17 +1,19 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	pavuk
-# Version required:			0.9pl13
+# Version required:			0.9pl15
 # Date created:				19 March 1998
 # Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.7 1999/05/19 19:47:47 mharo Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=		pavuk-0.9pl13
-PKGNAME=		pavuk-0.9.13
+DISTNAME=		pavuk-0.9pl15
+PKGNAME=		pavuk-0.9.15
 CATEGORIES=		net www
 MASTER_SITES=		${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE} \
-			ftp://ftp.idata.sk/pub/unix/www/
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	apps/www/mirroring
+			ftp://ftp.idata.sk/pub/unix/www/ \
+			ftp://ftp.phacka.sk/pub/pavuk/ \
+			http://www.idata.sk/~ondrej/sw/
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	X11/gtkbuffet/apps/pavuk
 EXTRACT_SUFX=		.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=		andy@icc.surw.chel.su
@@ -19,21 +21,25 @@
 LIB_DEPENDS=		Xpm.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/xpm
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=		--with-xpm-includes=${X11BASE}/include
 USE_GMAKE=		yes
 
 MAN1=			pavuk.1
 
 do-install:
-
 	@ ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/src/pavuk ${PREFIX}/bin
 	@ ${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/pavuk.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1
 	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/pavukrc.sample ${PREFIX}/etc
 	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/pavuk_authinfo.sample ${PREFIX}/etc
+	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/po/cs.mo ${PREFIX}/share/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES/pavuk.mo
+	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/po/de.mo ${PREFIX}/share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/pavuk.mo
+	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/po/sk.mo ${PREFIX}/share/locale/sk/LC_MESSAGES/pavuk.mo
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 	@ ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/pavuk
-.for file in AUTHORS ChangeLog README THANK_TO TODO
+.for file in AUTHORS BUGS ChangeLog FAQ README THANK_TO TODO
 	@ ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/pavuk
 .endfor
+
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -Nru pavuk/files/md5 pavuk-0.9.15/files/md5
--- pavuk/files/md5	Thu May 20 02:38:49 1999
+++ pavuk-0.9.15/files/md5	Fri Jun 25 08:59:39 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pavuk-0.9pl13.tgz) = 704eff1aaf8397533d0ccbb36b654cb3
+MD5 (pavuk-0.9pl15.tgz) = 89b113402591645c4e36b440f5c6582a
diff -Nru pavuk/pkg/DESCR pavuk-0.9.15/pkg/DESCR
--- pavuk/pkg/DESCR	Mon Mar 15 14:40:20 1999
+++ pavuk-0.9.15/pkg/DESCR	Fri Jun 25 08:23:28 1999
@@ -14,3 +14,5 @@
    - have X-windows user interface (built with own widgets based on plain Xt)
    - may be built with or without X-windows user interface
    - can handle setup files
+
+WWW: http://www.idata.sk/~ondrej/pavuk/
diff -Nru pavuk/pkg/PLIST pavuk-0.9.15/pkg/PLIST
--- pavuk/pkg/PLIST	Thu Apr 22 14:44:34 1999
+++ pavuk-0.9.15/pkg/PLIST	Fri Jun 25 09:25:51 1999
@@ -2,8 +2,13 @@
 etc/pavukrc.sample
 etc/pavuk_authinfo.sample
 share/doc/pavuk/AUTHORS
+share/doc/pavuk/BUGS
 share/doc/pavuk/ChangeLog
+share/doc/pavuk/FAQ
 share/doc/pavuk/README
 share/doc/pavuk/THANK_TO
 share/doc/pavuk/TODO
+share/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES/pavuk.mo
+share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/pavuk.mo
+share/locale/sk/LC_MESSAGES/pavuk.mo
 @dirrm share/doc/pavuk

Fix: 

Please, check and apply this patch.
